title: What I'm Learning at Wake Forest Athletics: And Why It's Not What I Expected
excerpt: Compliance work is quieter than the headlines suggest. Here's what Division I athletics compliance actually looks like from the inside, and why the MBA is getting more reps than the JD.

title: What Coaching Baseball Taught Me About Everything Else
excerpt: I started coaching baseball in 2021 because I loved the game. I kept coaching because I discovered that teaching someone else how to do something you love is a completely different skill than doing it yourself.
